should_trigger: The repo-explorer skill failed to include citations; create a refinement plan
Turn this user correction about a skill into per-skill memory and a PATCH.md proposal
A skill test failed; produce a non-destructive improvement proposal with regression coverage
should_not_trigger: Create a brand new skill from these repeated workflow notes
Audit installed skills and find duplicate scopes
Evaluate this SKILL.md for frontmatter and test failures

ambiguous.prompt: Use this skill feedback to improve the skill ecosystem
ambiguous.decision: Use skill-refinement-loop when the input is concrete runtime feedback or a failed invocation for one skill; use the bank manager for broad lifecycle inventory; use evaluator for validation checks.
ambiguous.reason: Feedback can imply audit, validation, or refinement; the decisive cue is whether a specific existing skill needs a proposal from evidence.

notes: Failure/correction-driven improvement proposals should route here.
